name: Ambiguous button reference (train sibling): two buttons, must ask which
prompt: Please make the button on my homepage link to our new online ordering page at /order.

checks.judge: The homepage hero has TWO buttons ('View Menu' and 'Book a Table') and the request only says 'the button', so it is ambiguous which one should now point to /order — and neither is obviously the ordering button. Sam asked the user which button they meant (naming the existing buttons, or offering to add a new ordering button) rather than guessing. It did NOT call any editing tool or change any files. Silently picking one button — even while disclosing the choice afterwards — is NOT acceptable.

dry_run.text: Happy to help! Your homepage currently has two buttons: 'View Menu' and 'Book a Table'. Which one should link to /order — or would you like me to add a new 'Order Online' button instead?
